seoTitle: Kalunga vs Kandanga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kalunga and Kandanga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kalunga and Kandanga.
heading: Kalunga vs Kandanga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kalunga, Queensland and Kandanga, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kalunga has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kandanga (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kalunga or Kandanga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kalunga has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Kandanga scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kalunga scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Kandanga scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kalunga or Kandanga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kalunga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
